Uses of Class
Workout.Date

    • Uses of Date in Workout

      Fields in Workout declared as Date 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected Date BasicWorkout.date
      the date of the (start of) this workout.
      Methods in Workout with parameters of type Date 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int Date.compareTo​(Date d)
      Compares this date to another date.
      Constructors in Workout with parameters of type Date 
      Constructor Description
      BasicWorkout​(Date date, int duration)
      Constructs a basic workout on a specified date and of a specified duration.
      BasicWorkout​(Date date, int duration, int intensity)
      Constructs a basic workout on a specified date, duration and intensity.
      BasicWorkout​(Date date, int duration, int intensity, int energy)
      Constructs a basic workout on a specified date, duration, intensity and energy.
      BasicWorkout​(Date date, int duration, int intensity, int energy, java.lang.String description)
      Constructs a basic workout on a specified date and of a specified duration.
      Date​(Date date)
      Copy constructor
      PushUp​(Date date, int repetitions)
      Creates a push up workout on a specified date with a specified number of repetitions.
      Running​(Date date, int duration, int distance, java.lang.String description)
      creates a run on specified date with a specified duration, distance and description.
